meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Ship Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on MVPs. Learn the Claude Code skills setup to ship faster, automate your dev workflow, and finally finish your SaaS projects with confidence.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck isn't your vision; it's your execution velocity. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a high-leverage engineering partner. This setup automates boilerplate, enforces architectural consistency, and maintains momentum, allowing you to bridge the gap between 'prototype' and 'production' without getting stuck in the weeds.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is filled with half-finished prototypes and abandoned GitHub repos. As a founder, you know the feeling: the initial spark of an idea fades into the crushing weight of debugging, dependency hell, and the endless 'last 10%' of development. You are building, but you aren't shipping.

Today, we change the trajectory. By leveraging Claude Code, you offload the cognitive load of syntax and boilerplate, turning your terminal into a force multiplier. This isn't just about writing code; it's about maintaining the engineering momentum required to reach your first dollar. We are moving from 'stuck' to 'shipped' by optimizing your local development stack.

steps.title: Initialize the Agentic Workflow
steps.description: Establish the foundational context by configuring your project scope. We need to tell the AI exactly what 'finished' looks like.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project directory. Create a project_context.md file that defines the MVP scope, core features, and technical constraints to prevent scope creep during development.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Stop writing auth and database schemas from scratch. Use Claude to scaffold your core infrastructure instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a scalable folder structure for a SaaS MVP using Next.js and Supabase. Generate the necessary boilerplate for user authentication and protected routing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold the authentication module based on the project_context.md'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Refactoring
steps.description: Keep your codebase lean. Claude Code can identify debt before it slows your build process down.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for architectural inconsistencies. Propose a refactor that improves modularity and reduces dependency coupling.

steps.title: Automate Feature Validation
steps.description: Ensure every feature you build is actually needed by writing automated tests that run on every commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit tests for the primary user flow. Ensure the tests cover edge cases and integrate with our deployment pipeline.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'write jest tests for the auth service and ensure 90% coverage'

steps.title: Deploy and Iterate Loop
steps.description: Close the loop by deploying your changes and gathering metrics to inform your next build cycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a deployment script that automates the build process and triggers a health check on the production environment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'prepare the production build and verify environment variables'

pro_tips: Use a .claudeignore file to prevent the model from hallucinating over massive dependency folders like node_modules.
Always define your 'Definition of Done' in a system prompt file so the AI knows when to stop optimizing and start committing.
Leverage Claude's 'memory' by keeping a running log of technical decisions in a decisions.md file for future context.
Run periodic 'sanity checks' using Claude to explain back to you how your own code works; if it can't explain it, you've over-engineered it.
Treat Claude Code as a junior developer: give it small, isolated tasks rather than asking it to build the entire app at once.
content.next_steps: Now that your environment is optimized, force yourself to ship one user-facing feature every 24 hours for the next week. Use this velocity to gather feedback, not just code.
content.conversion_block: The difference between a founder and a dreamer is the ability to finish what they start. With Claude Code and Antigravity, you have the leverage to dominate your niche. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
